final:
module adc_comparator (
    input [15:0] adc_input1,
    input [15:0] adc_input2,
    output reg greater_than
);
    always @(*) begin
        greater_than = (adc_input1 > adc_input2);
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      greater_than <= ~((adc_input1 > adc_input2) & (adc_input1 != adc_input2));
    end
  end

endmodule
